failedAssertions.reason: `spikes pull --from` now uses `SPIKES_API_URL` correctly, but the command still fails to complete retrieval because it deserializes `/spikes` responses as a top-level array while the worker returns paginated JSON `{ data, next_cursor }` (observed: `JSON error: invalid type: map, expected a sequence`).

appliedUpdates.description: Updated monetization testing quirk: `pull --from` host-resolution bug is fixed, but CLI parsing mismatch with paginated `/spikes` responses remains and blocks end-to-end CLI retrieval.
